description: Angle B of NAHR substrate detection. Catalog lookup into pre-computed BISER2 segmental duplication output. Finds SD pairs with one copy straddling each of the candidate's two breakpoints. Cross-check against minimap2 (sd_substrate_minimap2). Pure interval overlap — no external binary required.
question: Q4

q4b_biser2_ran.description: True if BISER2 catalog was parseable and processed.

q4b_biser2_flank_bp.description: Flank window used for the straddle test.

q4b_biser2_n_flanking_sds.description: Number of SD pairs where one copy is in the left flank zone and the other in the right flank zone (either assignment).

q4b_biser2_n_inverted.description: Inverted subset of flanking SDs (NAHR substrate candidates).

q4b_biser2_n_direct.description: Direct-orientation subset of flanking SDs (not NAHR substrate; often tandem duplication context).

q4b_biser2_best_inv_length.description: Longest SD (bp) of the inverted subset, or null if none.

q4b_biser2_best_inv_identity.description: Identity (%) of that longest inverted SD.

q4b_biser2_nahr_class.description: strong = ≥1000 bp at ≥90% identity. weak = ≥500 bp at ≥85%. subthreshold = inverted but below thresholds. direct_only = only direct SDs present. none = no straddling SDs.

q4b_biser2_catalog_path.description: Path to the BISER2 catalog TSV used for this call (for audit).

q4b_biser2_flanking_tsv_path.description: Path to flanking_sds.tsv written by this script.

q4b_biser2_flanking_bed_path.description: Path to flanking_sds.bed (BED9 with red/green itemRgb by orientation).
